result.reason: SSH connections established via PuTTY-based protocols in mRemoteNG do not automatically reconnect or maintain state after the system resumes from sleep mode, leading to disconnected sessions.
result.approach: Implement power management event handling in frmMain.cs to detect system resume. Upon resume, iterate through active PuTTY-based SSH connections (ProtocolSSH1, ProtocolSSH2), check the state of their respective PuTTY processes, and, if disconnected, trigger an automatic re-establishment of the connection.
